nodes.label: Phase 1: Task 10 - Integration Tests (TDD)  End-to-end test of handoff flow co
Compatible ready cases should share one build manifest.                  Flow:
Mixed presets are still split when the first manifest hits build budget.
Manifest processing should call scene import/layout/validation/save-form APIs.
PreForm validation warnings still save a .form and continue handoff.
Poll for status updates from Formlabs API.                  Flow:         1.
Screenshot should display in UI.                  Flow:         1. Job create
Error recovery should work.                  Flow:         1. PreFormServer f
Batch planning should preserve per-preset import groups inside one manifest.
Job names should use date prefix plus a daily four-digit sequence.
Job name generation should fail clearly when all daily slots are used.
Complete workflow from upload to print.                  1. Upload STL files
System should recover from errors.                  1. PreFormServer down
